sentiment: The overlooked thing still has a life in it — you just have to look closer.

stories.title: I turned a $80 RK3562 Android tablet into a Debian Linux workstation
stories.summary: A hacker stripped an $80 Android tablet to its bones and put Debian on it — proof that the overlooked machine still holds a life worth living if you're willing to look closer.

stories.title: Show HN: Semble – Code search for agents that uses 98% fewer tokens than grep
stories.summary: A new code-search tool for AI agents cuts token use by 98% compared to grep — efficiency born from restraint, not power.

stories.title: GenCAD
stories.summary: An open-source generative CAD tool that produces parametric geometry from code — the overlooked little program that quietly does the work of larger systems.
